title: Can you spot which committed file explains this mismatch?
summary: A package management puzzle demonstrates how local development and CI environments can install the same declared dependency but end up with different versions despite package.json remaining unchanged. The technique involves analyzing how the install resolution process determines actual versions based on lock files or similar mechanisms.
